# Yumma CSS
This is the documentation for the `yummacss` package.
An atomic CSS framework with abbreviated class names.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://yummacss.com/docs/installation): Install Yumma CSS using the CLI or CDN.
- [Configuration](https://yummacss.com/docs/configuration): Configure your Yumma CSS project.
- [Editor Support](https://yummacss.com/docs/editor-support): Editor support for auto-completion, previews & diagnostics.
- [Functions & Types](https://yummacss.com/docs/functions-types): Access Yumma CSS utilities, variants, and types programmatically.
- [Upgrading](https://yummacss.com/docs/upgrading): Guide for migrating from legacy versions of Yumma CSS.

## Foundations

- [Styling Elements](https://yummacss.com/docs/styling-elements): Learn how to apply & combine utility classes.
- [Colors](https://yummacss.com/docs/colors): Reference for all built-in color families & shades.
- [Media Queries](https://yummacss.com/docs/media-queries): Build flexible user interfaces with responsive variants.
- [Container Queries](https://yummacss.com/docs/container-queries): Apply styles based on the size of a parent container.
- [Negative Values](https://yummacss.com/docs/negative-values): Reference for applying negative offsets & margins.
- [Pseudo Classes](https://yummacss.com/docs/pseudo-classes): Reference for interactive state & structural pseudo-classes.
- [Pseudo Elements](https://yummacss.com/docs/pseudo-elements): Reference for styling specific parts of elements.
- [Base Styles](https://yummacss.com/docs/base-styles): Standardize browser defaults with modern base styles.

## Background

- [Background Attachment](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-attachment): Set the scroll behavior for background images.
- [Background Clip](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-clip): Set the background image extent within an element.
- [Background Origin](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-origin): Set the background positioning area relative to borders, padding & content.
- [Background Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-position): Set the background image position within an element.
- [Background Repeat](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-repeat): Set the repeat behavior for background images.
- [Background Size](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-size): Set the background image size within an element.

## Border & Outline

- [Border Collapse](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-collapse): Set the collapsing behavior for table borders.
- [Border Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-radius): Set the radius for element borders.
- [Border Bottom Left Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-bottom-left-radius): Set the bottom left border radius for an element.
- [Border Bottom Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-bottom-radius): Set the bottom border radius for an element.
- [Border Bottom Right Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-bottom-right-radius): Set the bottom right border radius for an element.
- [Border Left Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-left-radius): Set the left border radius for an element.
- [Border Right Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-right-radius): Set the right border radius for an element.
- [Border Top Left Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-top-left-radius): Set the top left border radius for an element.
- [Border Top Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-top-radius): Set the top border radius for an element.
- [Border Top Right Radius](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-top-right-radius): Set the top right border radius for an element.
- [Border Spacing](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-spacing): Set the distance between table borders.
- [Border Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-style): Set the style for element borders.
- [Border Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-width): Set the width for element borders.
- [Outline Offset](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-offset): Set the offset for an element
- [Outline Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-style): Set the style for an element
- [Outline Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-width): Set the width for an element

## Box Model

- [Aspect Ratio](https://yummacss.com/docs/aspect-ratio): Set the aspect ratio of an element.
- [Box Sizing](https://yummacss.com/docs/box-sizing): Set the box sizing model for an element.
- [Height](https://yummacss.com/docs/height): Set the height for an element.
- [Max Height](https://yummacss.com/docs/max-height): Limit the maximum height of an element.
- [Min Height](https://yummacss.com/docs/min-height): Set the minimum height of an element.
- [Margin](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin): Set the margin for an element.
- [Margin Top](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-top): Control an element
- [Margin Right](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-right): Control an element
- [Margin Bottom](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-bottom): Control an element
- [Margin Left](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-left): Control an element
- [Margin Block](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-block): Control an element
- [Margin Block Start](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-block-start): Control an element
- [Margin Block End](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-block-end): Control an element
- [Margin Inline](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-inline): Control an element
- [Margin Inline Start](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-inline-start): Control an element
- [Margin Inline End](https://yummacss.com/docs/margin-inline-end): Control an element
- [Padding](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding): Set the padding for an element.
- [Padding Top](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-top): Control an element
- [Padding Right](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-right): Control an element
- [Padding Bottom](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-bottom): Control an element
- [Padding Left](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-left): Control an element
- [Padding Block](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-block): Control an element
- [Padding Block Start](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-block-start): Control an element
- [Padding Block End](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-block-end): Control an element
- [Padding Inline](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-inline): Control an element
- [Padding Inline Start](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-inline-start): Control an element
- [Padding Inline End](https://yummacss.com/docs/padding-inline-end): Control an element
- [Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/width): Set the width for an element.
- [Max Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/max-width): Limit the maximum width of an element.
- [Min Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/min-width): Set the minimum width of an element.

## Colors

- [Accent Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/accent-color): Set the accent color for form controls.
- [Background Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/background-color): Set the background color for an element.
- [Border Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/border-color): Set the color for element borders.
- [Caret Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/caret-color): Set the color for text input cursors.
- [Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/color): Set the text color for an element.
- [Fill](https://yummacss.com/docs/fill): Set the fill color for SVG elements.
- [Outline Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/outline-color): Set the color for an element
- [Stroke](https://yummacss.com/docs/stroke): Set the stroke color for SVG elements.
- [Text Decoration Color](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-color): Set the color for text decorations.

## Effects

- [Backdrop Blur](https://yummacss.com/docs/backdrop-blur): Set the backdrop blur filter for an element.
- [Backdrop Grayscale](https://yummacss.com/docs/backdrop-grayscale): Apply a grayscale filter to the area behind an element.
- [Blur](https://yummacss.com/docs/blur): Set the blur filter for an element.
- [Box Shadow](https://yummacss.com/docs/box-shadow): Set the box shadow for an element.
- [Grayscale](https://yummacss.com/docs/grayscale): Set the grayscale filter for an element.
- [Mix Blend Mode](https://yummacss.com/docs/mix-blend-mode): Set how an element
- [Opacity](https://yummacss.com/docs/opacity): Set the opacity for an element.

## Flexbox & Grid

- [Align Content](https://yummacss.com/docs/align-content): Set row alignment in multi-row Flex & Grid containers.
- [Align Items](https://yummacss.com/docs/align-items): Set item alignment along a container
- [Align Self](https://yummacss.com/docs/align-self): Set individual item alignment along a container
- [Flex](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex): Set how flex items grow & shrink.
- [Flex Basis](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-basis): Set the initial size for flex items.
- [Flex Direction](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-direction): Set the direction for flex items.
- [Flex Grow](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-grow): Set how flex items grow to fill available space.
- [Flex Shrink](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-shrink): Set how flex items shrink to fit the container.
- [Flex Wrap](https://yummacss.com/docs/flex-wrap): Set how flex items wrap in a container.
- [Justify Content](https://yummacss.com/docs/justify-content): Set item alignment along a container
- [Justify Items](https://yummacss.com/docs/justify-items): Set item alignment along a container
- [Justify Self](https://yummacss.com/docs/justify-self): Set individual item alignment along a container
- [Order](https://yummacss.com/docs/order): Set the order for flex & grid items.
- [Column Gap](https://yummacss.com/docs/column-gap): Set the spacing between columns in a grid layout.
- [Gap](https://yummacss.com/docs/gap): Set the spacing between flex & grid items.
- [Grid Auto Columns](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-auto-columns): Set the size of implicitly-created grid columns.
- [Grid Auto Flow](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-auto-flow): Set how items are automatically placed in a grid.
- [Grid Auto Rows](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-auto-rows): Set the size of implicitly-created grid rows.
- [Grid Column](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-column): Set the size & position of items across grid columns.
- [Grid Column End](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-column-end): Control where a grid item ends within the grid columns.
- [Grid Column Span](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-column-span): Allow a grid item to span a specific number of columns.
- [Grid Column Start](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-column-start): Control the starting grid line for a grid item.
- [Grid Row](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-row): Set the size & position of items across grid rows.
- [Grid Row End](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-row-end): Control where a grid item ends within the grid rows.
- [Grid Row Span](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-row-span): Control the row span of a grid item.
- [Grid Row Start](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-row-start): Control where a grid item begins within the grid rows.
- [Grid Template Columns](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-template-columns): Set the columns for a grid layout.
- [Grid Template Rows](https://yummacss.com/docs/grid-template-rows): Set the rows for a grid layout.
- [Place Content](https://yummacss.com/docs/place-content): Set item justification & alignment simultaneously.
- [Place Items](https://yummacss.com/docs/place-items): Set item justification & alignment simultaneously.
- [Place Self](https://yummacss.com/docs/place-self): Set individual item justification & alignment simultaneously.
- [Row Gap](https://yummacss.com/docs/row-gap): Set the spacing between rows in a grid layout.

## Interactivity

- [Appearance](https://yummacss.com/docs/appearance): Set the appearance for native form controls.
- [Cursor](https://yummacss.com/docs/cursor): Set the cursor style when hovering over an element.
- [Field Sizing](https://yummacss.com/docs/field-sizing): Set how form fields size themselves based on content.
- [Overscroll Behavior](https://yummacss.com/docs/overscroll-behavior): Set the browser
- [Overscroll Behavior Block](https://yummacss.com/docs/overscroll-behavior-block): Set the browser
- [Overscroll Behavior Inline](https://yummacss.com/docs/overscroll-behavior-inline): Set the browser
- [Overscroll Behavior X](https://yummacss.com/docs/overscroll-behavior-x): Set the browser
- [Overscroll Behavior Y](https://yummacss.com/docs/overscroll-behavior-y): Set the browser
- [Pointer Events](https://yummacss.com/docs/pointer-events): Set how an item responds to pointer events.
- [Resize](https://yummacss.com/docs/resize): Set how an element can be resized.
- [Scroll Behavior](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-behavior): Set the scroll behavior for internal navigation.
- [Scroll Margin](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-margin): Set the scroll margin for snapping & alignment.
- [Scroll Padding](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-padding): Set the scroll padding for snapping & alignment.
- [Scroll Snap Align](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-snap-align): Set the snap alignment of an element.
- [Scroll Snap Stop](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-snap-stop): Set the scroll snap skipping behavior.
- [Scroll Snap Type](https://yummacss.com/docs/scroll-snap-type): Set the scroll snap direction & strictness.
- [Touch Action](https://yummacss.com/docs/touch-action): Set how touch gestures are handled by an element.
- [User Select](https://yummacss.com/docs/user-select): Set the ability for users to select text in an element.

## Layout

- [Clear](https://yummacss.com/docs/clear): Set how an element behaves in relation to floating elements.
- [Columns](https://yummacss.com/docs/columns): Set the number of columns within an element.
- [Display](https://yummacss.com/docs/display): Set the display box type of an element.
- [Float](https://yummacss.com/docs/float): Set how an element floats within its container.
- [Isolation](https://yummacss.com/docs/isolation): Set whether an element must create a new stacking context.

## Positioning

- [Bottom](https://yummacss.com/docs/bottom): Set the bottom placement of positioned elements.
- [Inset](https://yummacss.com/docs/inset): Set the placement of positioned elements.
- [Left](https://yummacss.com/docs/left): Set the left placement of positioned elements.
- [Object Fit](https://yummacss.com/docs/object-fit): Set how to resize the content of a replaced element.
- [Object Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/object-position): Set how to position the container
- [Overflow](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow): Set how content overflows its container.
- [Overflow X](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow-x): Set how content overflows on the horizontal axis.
- [Overflow Y](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow-y): Set how content overflows on the vertical axis.
- [Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/position): Set the positioning of an element.
- [Right](https://yummacss.com/docs/right): Set the right placement of positioned elements.
- [Top](https://yummacss.com/docs/top): Set the top placement of positioned elements.
- [Visibility](https://yummacss.com/docs/visibility): Set whether an element is visible or hidden.
- [Z-Index](https://yummacss.com/docs/z-index): Set the stack order for an element.

## SVG

- [Stroke Width](https://yummacss.com/docs/stroke-width): Set the width of a stroke in SVG shapes.

## Table

- [Caption Side](https://yummacss.com/docs/caption-side): Set the vertical position of a table caption.
- [Empty Cells](https://yummacss.com/docs/empty-cells): Set whether or not empty table cells have borders & backgrounds.
- [Table Layout](https://yummacss.com/docs/table-layout): Set the table cell layout algorithm.

## Transform

- [Rotate](https://yummacss.com/docs/rotate): Set the rotation for an element.
- [Scale](https://yummacss.com/docs/scale): Set the scale for an element.
- [Skew X](https://yummacss.com/docs/skew-x): Set the horizontal skew for an element.
- [Skew Y](https://yummacss.com/docs/skew-y): Set the vertical skew for an element.
- [Skew](https://yummacss.com/docs/skew): Set the skew for an element.
- [Transform Origin](https://yummacss.com/docs/transform-origin): Set the origin point for transformations.
- [Translate X](https://yummacss.com/docs/translate-x): Set the horizontal translation for an element.
- [Translate Y](https://yummacss.com/docs/translate-y): Set the vertical translation for an element.

## Transition

- [Transition Delay](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-delay): Set the delay before a transition effect starts.
- [Transition Duration](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-duration): Set the amount of time a transition takes to complete.
- [Transition Property](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-property): Set which properties have a transition effect.
- [Transition Timing Function](https://yummacss.com/docs/transition-timing-function): Set the speed curve for a transition effect.

## Typography

- [Font Family](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-family): Set the font family for an element.
- [Font Size](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-size): Set the font size for an element.
- [Font Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-style): Set the font style for an element.
- [Font Weight](https://yummacss.com/docs/font-weight): Set the font weight for an element.
- [Letter Spacing](https://yummacss.com/docs/letter-spacing): Set the letter spacing for an element.
- [Line Height](https://yummacss.com/docs/line-height): Set the line height of an element.
- [List Style Position](https://yummacss.com/docs/list-style-position): Set the position of the list item marker.
- [List Style Type](https://yummacss.com/docs/list-style-type): Set the marker style of a list.
- [Overflow Wrap](https://yummacss.com/docs/overflow-wrap): Set how words wrap when they overflow their container.
- [Tab Size](https://yummacss.com/docs/tab-size): Set the width of horizontal tab characters.
- [Text Align](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-align): Set the horizontal alignment of text.
- [Text Decoration Line](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-line): Set the type of decorative lines used on text.
- [Text Decoration Style](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-style): Set the style of decorative lines on text.
- [Text Decoration Thickness](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration-thickness): Set the thickness of decorative lines on text.
- [Text Decoration](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-decoration): Set the appearance of decorative lines on text.
- [Text Indent](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-indent): Set the indentation of the first line of text.
- [Text Overflow](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-overflow): Set how overflowing text is signaled to the user.
- [Text Transform](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-transform): Set the capitalization of text.
- [Text Underline Offset](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-underline-offset): Set the offset of a text underline.
- [Text Wrap](https://yummacss.com/docs/text-wrap): Set how text wraps within an element.
- [Vertical Align](https://yummacss.com/docs/vertical-align): Set the vertical alignment of an inline or table-cell element.
- [White Space](https://yummacss.com/docs/white-space): Set how white space & line wrapping are handled.
- [Word Break](https://yummacss.com/docs/word-break): Specify how words should break when reaching the edge of a line.
- [Writing Mode](https://yummacss.com/docs/writing-mode): Set whether lines of text are laid out horizontally or vertically.

## Full Reference
- [Full Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yumma-lib/yumma-css-docs/main/AGENTS.md): Comprehensive reference with examples and common patterns for AI systems.
